prompt:
I rebased the permit-kiosk branch onto two weeks of upstream and now the trailperm package won't build. It starts with this:

  zones.go:5:8: expected ';', found ','

but it's a moving target — I chased it for twenty minutes and every time I appease the compiler it points at a new line, at one point in a file I haven't opened this whole cycle, so I clearly broke something structural in the rebase rather than any one line. I gave up and reset my attempts; you're looking at the branch as the rebase left it.

The behavior is not in question: the district zone list and quotas are out of the operating plan, the kiosk board format is what the rangers print every morning, and go test ./... pins all of it. Smallest possible repair to get it compiling and green — no refactors, no renames, and trailperm_test.go must not change.
